title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Pigment is an AI performance management platform that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data for enterprise decision-making. Co-founded by Eléonore Crespo, the company has raised over 400 million dollars and counts Figma, Brex, and Anthropic as customers, growing 2x year over year.
writeup: EO interviews Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, an AI performance management platform that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data for enterprise decision-making. The conversation centers on how a startup competes against far larger incumbents in the planning and performance management market. Concrete details: Pigment has raised over 400 million dollars, counts Figma, Brex, and Anthropic as customers, and is growing 2x year over year.
